summary: Decent front‑logement audience recording captures the show with acceptable clarity
review: The reviewer was sitting just left of the soundboard in the front loge and recorded the concert (despite getting busted). The tape streams well enough for background listening, indicating a reasonably clear audience capture, though no musical details are mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderately positive review (4 stars) with limited detail; recording seems usable but show performance is not described, leading to a cautious rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recorded from front loge near the soundboard; likely clear enough for streaming with typical audience ambience.
